title: Vlocity DataRaptor Transform DataPack Schema
description: Schema for Vlocity / OmniStudio DataRaptor Transform DataPacks, supporting both managed package (%vlocity_namespace%) and native (OmniDataTransform) schema formats.

Name.description: The name of the DataRaptor Transform, unique in the org.

InputType.description: The type of input format accepted.

OutputType.description: The type of output format produced.

GlobalKey.description: The global unique key for deployment/migration. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__GlobalKey__c, Native field: GlobalKey.

IgnoreErrors.description: Whether to ignore errors for individual mapping rows. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__IgnoreErrors__c, Native field: IsErrorIgnored.

OverwriteAllNullValues.description: Include null values in save operation. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__OverwriteAllNullValues__c, Native field: IsNullInputsIncludedInOutput.

Mappings.description: List of mapping items defining target JSON reshapes.

DomainObjectAPIName.description: The target JSON node/path to map into, e.g. 'OutputList:Phone', 'Output:Name'. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__DomainObjectAPIName__c, Native field: DomainObjectAPIName.

InterfaceFieldAPIName.description: The input JSON path mapping source, e.g. 'InputList:Phone', 'InputName' or formula string. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__InterfaceFieldAPIName__c, Native field: InterfaceFieldAPIName.

IsDisabled.description: Whether this mapping item is currently disabled. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__IsDisabled__c, Native field: IsDisabled.
